# alignasya.com

> AlignAsya is a professional single-page website of modern physiotherapy and wellness centre led by Dr. Renu Saroj at Mira Road Mumbai, offering services and solutions.

## Navigation
- [Home](https://alignasya.com): Main hub showcasing our Modern technique of physiotherapy, family testimonials, and clinic overview.

## Core Content
This is a single-page HTML website. All critical business information, including the company overview, services offered, team details, and contact information, is contained entirely on the primary homepage.
At Align Asya Physiotherapy Centre, Mira Road, Mumbai, we provide comprehensive, evidence-based physiotherapy care using state-of-the-art facilities and modern treatment modalities. Our expert physiotherapists focus on relieving pain, restoring movement, and enhancing overall quality of life through personalized treatment plans. We offer a wide range of services including manual therapy, therapeutic exercises, electrotherapy, and hydrotherapy, ensuring faster recovery and long-term results for patients of all age groups.

## Crawler Instructions
User-agent: *
Allow: /
